data.title: Nasdaq up 100 pts; FedEx beats Q1 estimates with $22.2B revenue & $3.83 EPS, aims 4-6% YoY revenue growth in fiscal 2026.
data.description: U.S. stocks saw gains this morning, with the Nasdaq Composite rising by over 100 points. The Dow traded up by 0.18% to 46,226.49, the NASDAQ increased by 0.50% to 22,582.78, and the S&P 500 also climbed by 0.23% to 6,646.98. Consumer discretionary shares surged by 0.8%, however, energy stocks dropped by 0.9%. FedEx Corp. (NYSE: FDX) reported better-than-expected financial results for the first quarter of fiscal 2026, with revenue at $22.2 billion, surpassing estimates of $21.67 billion, and adjusted earnings at $3.83 per share, beating estimates of $3.62 per share. FedEx projects a 4% to 6% increase in revenue year-over-year for fiscal 2026. The company also affirmed plans for permanent cost reductions.

data.title: Perspire Sauna Studio expands with multiple units in 6 states. Largest sauna franchise. Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: Perspire Sauna Studio, the leading franchise in infrared sauna and red-light therapy, has announced the opening of new studios in various locations across the United States. The expansion includes new studios in Connecticut, Florida, New Jersey, New York, Southern California, and Virginia. This marks a significant development for the company as it continues to grow its presence nationwide. The announcement was made on September 19, 2025, from Costa Mesa, California, where the company is headquartered. Perspire Sauna Studio is known for its innovative approach to wellness, offering full spectrum infrared sauna and red-light therapy services.

data.title: TRON aims to reach $0.37 by October 2025, with current resistance at same level and bullish momentum.
data.description: According to analysts, the price prediction for TRX indicates a potential resistance test at $0.37 in the coming weeks. TRON's technical analysis suggests a strong bullish momentum, despite sentiment indicators showing neutrality.

data.title: Darden Restaurants (NYSE: DRI) misses Q1 earnings with $1.97 per share and $3.004 billion sales, resulting in adjusted EPS guidance.
data.description: Darden Restaurants, Inc. (NYSE: DRI) released first-quarter financial results that fell short of expectations. The company reported earnings of $1.97 per share, below the anticipated $2.00 per share. Quarterly sales were reported at $3.004 billion, missing the expected $3.040 billion. Despite this, Darden President & CEO Rick Cardenas expressed positivity about exceeding expectations in same-restaurant sales and earnings growth at the start of the fiscal year. The company maintained its adjusted EPS guidance for fiscal 2026 at $10.50–$10.70, in contrast to the estimated $10.68. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bulgaria's construction industry to grow by 3.9% in 2025, fueled by investments in transport, energy projects, and FDI.
data.description: A recent report on the Bulgaria Construction Market indicates that the industry is projected to experience a growth of 3.9% in real terms by the year 2025. This growth is primarily attributed to investments in transport and energy projects within the country. The sectoral analysis in the report covers Commercial, Industrial, Infrastructure, Energy and Utilities, Institutional, and Residential sectors. Additionally, it highlights a rise in the total value of loans awarded for construction purposes. The report offers detailed insights, trends, and forecasts up to 2029, aiming to provide a comprehensive overview of the construction market in Bulgaria.

data.title: Adhesives & Sealants market to reach $91.23 billion by 2030 per MarketsandMarkets™ report. Key technology and applications outlined.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, on September 19, 2025, a new report on the Adhesives & Sealants Market was released. This report covers various aspects of the market including Adhesive Technology such as Water-based and Solvent-based, Adhesive Application in sectors like Building & Construction and Paper & Packaging, Sealant Resin Type like Silicone and Acrylic, and Sealant Application predominantly in the building industry. The report provides in-depth analysis and insights into the market trends. It discusses key figures and projections in terms of market size, growth potential, and key players in the industry.

data.title: Inventor from Louisville creates VA JAZZ to protect against infections in pools and hot tubs.(Character count: 87)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, an inventor from Louisville, Kentucky conceptualized a solution to safeguard women from vaginal bacterial infections in pools or hot tubs. The invention, known as VA JAZZ, has been specifically engineered for this purpose. It aims to provide comprehensive protection for females in such environments. The inventor's creation highlights a unique approach to addressing this concern and could potentially benefit a significant number of individuals.

data.title: Investors of Cytokinetics urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP if suffered losses. Invested between Dec 27, 2023 - May 6, 2025.
data.description: James (Josh) Wilson, a Securities Litigation Partner at Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, is urging investors who faced losses in Cytokinetics to reach out to him for a discussion on potential options. This invitation is directed towards individuals who bought or obtained Cytokinetics securities during the period spanning from December 27, 2023, to May 6, 2025. If you fall into this category and wish to explore your options, you are encouraged to directly contact James Wilson.

data.title: Hess Midstream revises outlook due to Chevron cutting Bakken drilling. Oil volumes to level off as gas throughput grows; Chevron reducing rigs from four to three, with oil volumes expected to plateau in 2026. Gas throughput set to expand through 2027, ensuring volume levels above commitments. Hess Midstream emphasizes financial stability.
data.description: Hess Midstream LP (NYSE: HESM) recently revised its financial and operational forecast for the upcoming years due to a decrease in drilling activity by Chevron Corp (NYSE: CVX) in the Bakken region starting in the fourth quarter of 2025. The company expects oil volumes to stabilize, but remains optimistic about gas throughput growth, which is projected to sustain earnings and capital returns for investors until 2027. Following Chevron's decision to reduce its rig count in the Bakken from four to three by the end of 2025, Hess Midstream predicts a plateau in oil throughput volumes by 2026. However, the partnership anticipates continued expansion in gas throughput beyond 2027, ensuring volume levels surpass minimum commitments. Despite these adjustments, management highlights the importance of maintaining financial stability amid the changing dynamics. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: $25,000 contest invites U.S. schools and child care centers to create outdoor classrooms, promoting nature-based education.
data.description: In Fort Collins, Colorado, on September 19, 2025, a shift in education is taking place as outdoor learning becomes the new norm. Being in nature during educational activities enhances retention rates, raises test scores, and boosts overall physical and mental health. This approach highlights the importance of engaging all senses while learning. This initiative aims to enhance children's learning experiences by emphasizing the benefits of outdoor education.

data.title: Kentro wins Department of Defense NGA VERTEX contract, providing program and combat support.
data.description: In McLean, Virginia on September 19, 2025, IT Concepts, Inc., operating under the name Kentro, secured a significant contract from the Department of Defense's National Geospatial-Intelligence Agency (NGA) known as VERTEX. This contract will supply NGA with essential program and combat support resources. Kentro's successful bid underlines its commitment to supporting NGA's operations and underscores its role as a trusted partner in ensuring the agency's efficiency and effectiveness.

data.title: Litecoin aims $148 with 27% potential upside, supported by bullish indicators and forecasts for October 2025. Resistance at $120.83 key.
data.description: Predictions for the price of LTC suggest a potential 27% increase to reach a target of $148, driven by a positive MACD histogram and analyst projections. However, there is significant resistance at $120.83 that needs to be overcome for the forecasted increase to materialize.
